zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Verch Ithel於1512年出生在威爾士福林爾易費格時，她的父親Ithel ap Jenkin32歲，母親Alice ferch Rhys33歲。她和John ap Harri Wynne至少有6個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1591年享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Verch Ithel于1512年出生在威尔士福林爾易費格时，她的父亲Ithel ap Jenkin32岁，母亲Alice ferch Rhys33岁。她和John ap Harri Wynne至少有6个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1591年享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Verch Ithel was born in 1512, in Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales, her father, Ithel ap Jenkin, was 32 and her mother, Alice ferch Rhys, was 33. She had at least 6 sons and 7 daughters with John ap Harri Wynne. She died in 1591, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Verch Ithel est née en 1512, à Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Ithel ap Jenkin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice ferch Rhys, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles avec John ap Harri Wynne. Elle est décédée en 1591, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Verch Ithel 1512 in Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithel ap Jenkin 32 und ihre Mutter Alice ferch Rhys 33. Sie hatte mit John ap Harri Wynne mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1591 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Verch Ithel è nata il nel 1512 nel Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Galles, sua padre, Ithel ap Jenkin, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice ferch Rhys, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie con John ap Harri Wynne. Morì nel 1591, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Verch Ithelが1512年にウェールズフリントシュアイアイスセイフィオグで生まれた時，父Ithel ap Jenkinは32歳，母Alice ferch Rhysは33歳であった。彼女はJohn ap Harri Wynneとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1591年に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Verch Ithel(이)가 1512년 웨일스 플린츠히르 이스스이피오그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithel ap Jenkin(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice ferch Rhys(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 John ap Harri Wynne(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Verch Ithel nasceu em 1512, em Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Ithel ap Jenkin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice ferch Rhys, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas com John ap Harri Wynne. Ela faleceu em 1591, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Verch Ithel родилась в 1512 г. в местности иссифиог, флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ithel ap Jenkin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice ferch Rhys, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей от John ap Harri Wynne. Она умерла в 1591 г. в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Verch Ithel nació en 1512, en Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Ithel ap Jenkin, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice ferch Rhys, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas con John ap Harri Wynne. Murió en 1591, a la edad de 79 años.
